reviews.comment:
Fuimos 3 veces, de las cuales dos me atendieron playeras muy mal gestadas, el playero muy bien. Hay solo un playero para varios surtidores, una vergüenza que el dueño no contrate más personal, eso genera que haya una fila interminable y mucha demora.

(Translated by Google)
We went three times, and twice I was served with very poorly made shirts, but the attendant was very nice. There's only one attendant for several pumps. It's a shame the owner doesn't hire more staff, which leads to endless lines and long delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMaU5lY2FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha demora en la carga de combustible Había un solo playero (pagos con app) y otro en efectivo. Muy atento pero no podía con todos

(Translated by Google)
There were long delays at the gas station. There was only one attendant (app payments only) and another for cash payments. He was very helpful but couldn't handle everyone.

reviews.comment:
Muy amable los playeros, un poco chica la estación con el inconveniente que hay una isla donde no se puede pagar con ninguna aplicación.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very friendly, the station is a bit small and there's the inconvenience of having an island where you can't pay with any app.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, a veces hay demoras por la cantidad de vehículos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, sometimes there are delays due to the number of vehicles.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMbHRMOFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Cargué 2 veces. El empleado muy buena atención. La estación de Servicio muy vieja y con mucha cola. Poco personal. Los baños todo un tema, el señor del surtidor tenía que dejar su trabajo, para abrirle a cada persona que pedía ir. Si venden un montón, pongan más personal

(Translated by Google)
I filled up twice. The attendant was very helpful. The gas station is very old and has a long line. There's not enough staff. The restrooms were a real problem; the pump attendant had to leave his job to open the door for every person who asked to use it. If they're selling so much gas, they should hire more people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMbk8yQTBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un solo empleado (muy amable él) atendiendo los surtidores y una enorme fila para cargar nafta que llegaba hasta la otra esquina, lo cual, además de habernos hecho perder más de una hora esperando, provocó un embotellamiento de vehículos en la calle lateral.
Es la segunda vez que nos ocurre lo mismo en esta estación y eso que solo hemos estado dos veces en Tinogasta.
Entiendo que no tengan la culpa de ser la única estación de servicio de la ciudad (si bien creo que existe otra) pero COMO MÍNIMO pongan tres o cuatro empleados a atender los surtidores...
Y la empleada dentro del local nos confesó que casi todos los días ocurre lo mismo.

(Translated by Google)
A single employee (a very friendly one) manning the pumps, and a huge line to fill up with gas that stretched to the other corner. This, in addition to wasting over an hour waiting, caused a traffic jam on the side street.
This is the second time this has happened to us at this station, and we've only been to Tinogasta twice.
I understand that it's not their fault that it's the only gas station in the city (although I believe there is another one), but AT LEAST, they should put three or four employees manning the pumps...
And the employee inside the store confessed to us that the same thing happens almost every day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6MU12VGtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre colas interminables los fines de semana 8 surtidores y un solo playero, una verguenza que siendo tinogasta sea tan turistico, la unica ypf sea tenga falta de personal y los mismos reclamos todos los años

(Translated by Google)
Always endless queues on weekends, 8 pumps and only one attendant, it's a disgrace that Tinogasta is so touristy, the only YPF station is understaffed and we hear the same complaints every year
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6cHRUVHd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
